programme.desc: Inspired by the Bible's Book of Hosea, Unfailing Love tells of the life of a young man dealing with a wife who is unfaithful to him, and a young woman struggling to find faith in God and hoping she can find everlasting love.

programme.desc: A meth dealer kills a man, gets caught, then manages to escape from prison.

programme.desc: Two brothers form their own militia to rob houses and break into cars.

programme.title: GOT to Rob Vacation Homes

programme.title: GOT to Run to Costa Rica
programme.desc: A clean-cut businessman leads a double life as a drug addict and burglar.

programme.title: GOT to Prey on Tourists
programme.desc: A tourist doesn't stop during a "bump and rob," so Patsy Jones opens fire.

programme.title: GOT to Make It in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A con-artist has his girlfriend forge checks, then murders her and her son.

programme.title: GOT to Become a Neo-Nazi
programme.desc: A neo-Nazi kills a neighbor who he feels is an enemy of the white race.

programme.title: GOT To Take Down My Ex
programme.desc: A robber accidentally shoots a man, and a mom gets revenge on her ex.

programme.channel: Dr. Phil Primetime on Merit Street
programme.title: Broken Justice: The Disappearance of Dylan Rounds
programme.desc: Dr. Phil meets with murdered Utah teen Dylan Rounds mother. Candice Rounds discusses the chilling disappearance of her son and the lengths she had to go to for justice.
